name: ai-summarize-dev
postCreateCommand: set -e; apt update && apt install -y curl vim ca-certificates gnupg && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_18.x | bash - && apt install -y nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && npm install && ./gradlew build && git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace
